geographic_restrictions: Delaware and Maryland (Delmarva Power’s service area)
project_area: Environmental stewardship, community resilience, open space conservation, pollution prevention, climate resiliency strategies, and passive recreation improvements
demographic_requirements: Organizations serving underrepresented communities are strongly encouraged to apply; no strict demographic requirements specified.
eligibility_summary: Municipalities, recreational authorities, and nonprofits within Delmarva Power’s service area in Delaware and Maryland are eligible. Projects must align with climate resiliency strategies or land management plans. Applications are reviewed by a committee including Delmarva Power, Delaware Nature Society, county agencies, and conservation organizations.
